A sharp sword forged from diamonds.
A ranged weapon for firing arrows.
An off-hand tool for blocking attacks.
A sturdy pickaxe made from iron.
A magical apple that grants regeneration.
A shimmering pearl from the Enderman.
A fiery rod dropped by Blazes.
An extremely hard block of volcanic obsidian.
Fine red powder used in redstone circuits.
A wooden crafting station for 3x3 recipes.
An enchanted table for applying magical enhancements.
A heated chamber for smelting ores and cooking food.
A wooden container for storing up to 27 items.
A cozy resting place that sets your spawn point.
A powerful explosive block activated by redstone or fire.
A redstone-powered mechanical block that pushes other blocks.
Guides you back to the world origin point.
Shows the current in-game time of day.
A gridded map of the surrounding terrain.
A blank book you can write your adventures in.
Place 2 diamonds above 1 stick to craft a Diamond Sword.
Arrange 3 sticks and 3 string to craft a Bow.
Place 1 iron ingot above a wooden plank to craft a Shield.
Surround 2 sticks with 3 iron ingots to make an Iron Pickaxe.
Surround an apple with 8 gold ingots to make a Golden Apple.
Ender Pearls are not crafted—they drop from Endermen.
Blaze Rods drop from Blazes in Nether fortresses.
Mine Obsidian by pouring water over a lava source block.
Break Redstone Ore with an Iron Pickaxe to get Redstone Dust.
Arrange 4 wooden planks in a 2x2 grid to craft a Crafting Table.
Surround a book and diamond with 4 obsidian to craft an Enchanting Table.
Place 8 cobblestone in a ring pattern to craft a Furnace.
Surround 8 wooden planks in a ring to craft a Chest.
Place 3 wool blocks on top of 3 wooden planks to craft a Bed.
Arrange 5 gunpowder and 4 sand alternately to craft TNT.
Place 3 iron ingots above a redstone and 4 planks to craft a Piston.
Craft a Compass from 4 iron ingots surrounding 1 Redstone Dust.
Craft a Clock from 4 gold ingots surrounding 1 Redstone Dust.
Craft a Map from 8 paper surrounding a Compass.
Craft a Book and Quill from 1 book, 1 feather, and 1 ink sac.
Creepers sneak up on players and explode, dealing heavy damage.
Endermen are tall, dark mobs that teleport and pick up blocks.
Skeletons are undead archers that attack players with bows.
Zombies are undead mobs that can break down wooden doors.
Spiders can climb walls and become neutral during daytime.
Blazes are fiery mobs found inside Nether fortresses.
Witches throw splash potions of harming, weakness, and slowness.
Slimes bounce around and split into smaller versions when killed.
Ghasts are large flying mobs that fire explosive fireballs.
Piglins are pig-like mobs that barter with players using gold.
Villagers trade resources and can be found in their villages.
Iron Golems are powerful constructs that protect villagers.
Phantoms attack players who have not slept for three nights.
The Warden is a blind mob that hunts by sound and vibration.
Axolotls are aquatic mobs that aid players in underwater combat.
Striders are fireproof mobs that walk on lava in the Nether.
Bees pollinate flowers and attack when provoked.
Foxes are cunning animals that carry items in their mouths.
Pandas have unique personalities and love to eat bamboo.
Turtles lay eggs on beaches and hatch into baby turtles.

Stone Age: Mine stone with your new pickaxe.
Getting an Upgrade: Construct a better pickaxe.
Acquire Hardware: Smelt an iron ingot.
Suit Up: Protect yourself with a piece of armor.
Hot Stuff: Fill a bucket with lava.
Ice Bucket Challenge: Obtain a block of obsidian.
We Need to Go Deeper: Build, light, and enter a Nether Portal.
Into Fire: Relieve a Blaze of its rod.
Remote Getaway: Escape the island.
The End?
Tip: Beds explode in the Nether and the End.
Tip: Creepers are afraid of cats.
Tip: Striders can be ridden across lava using a Warped Fungus on a Stick.
Tip: Drinking milk removes all potion effects.
Tip: Wearing a carved pumpkin prevents Endermen from turning hostile.
Tip: Lightning strikes can turn Creepers into charged Creepers.
Tip: Foxes are immune to sweet berry bush thorns.
Tip: You can lead passive mobs with a lead.
Tip: Name tags can be used to rename mobs and prevent despawning.
Tip: Silk Touch lets you mine blocks without destroying them.
Tip: Fortune increases your ore drops.
Tip: Unbreaking extends the durability of your tools.
Tip: Mending repairs items with experience orbs.
Tip: Looting increases mob drop rates.
Tip: Sharpness increases melee damage.
Tip: Power increases bow damage.
Tip: Flame sets arrows on fire.
Tip: Infinity allows you to shoot infinite arrows.
Tip: Knockback pushes mobs away on hit.
Tip: Feather Falling reduces fall damage on boots.
